title: BEM-846 validate protocol
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/protocols']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 16:36 (UTC+3)'
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
protocol=Path('governance/protocols/BEM845_AGREED_MULTI_AGENT_PROTOCOL_DRAFT.md')
text=read(protocol)
up=text.upper()
if 'CHANGE_REQUIRED' in up:
    decision='CHANGE_REQUIRED'
elif 'BLOCKED' in up:
    decision='BLOCKED'
elif 'APPROVED' in up:
    decision='APPROVED'
else:
    decision='UNKNOWN'
if decision=='APPROVED':
    status='protocol_approved_finalize_next'
    next_action='create final agreed protocol document and operator-facing summary'
elif decision=='CHANGE_REQUIRED':
    status='protocol_change_required_continue_agreement'
    next_action='extract required changes and send targeted response to Claude/internal audit'
elif decision=='BLOCKED':
    status='protocol_blocked_continue_repair'
    next_action='extract blocker and repair before requesting approval again'
else:
    status='protocol_decision_unknown_continue_agreement'
    next_action='ask Claude for explicit Decision field and continue agreement loop'
state={'bem':'BEM-846','status':status,'decision':decision,'protocol_path':str(protocol),'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem846_validate_protocol_draft_decision.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem846_validate_protocol_draft_decision.md').write_text('# BEM-846 | Validate Protocol Draft Decision | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem846_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-846'+sep+sep+'Decision: '+decision+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem846_validate_protocol_draft_decision.json','governance/reports/bem846_validate_protocol_draft_decision.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem846_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Validated decision field in BEM845 agreed protocol draft and selected finalize or continue-agreement next step')
"""
No issue comments.
